message:
Remove major from version bump dropdown

Major releases are rare and consequential. Removing from the dropdown
prevents accidental triggers and keeps the common path (minor/patch)
frictionless.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -10,7 +10,6 @@ on:
         options:
           - minor
           - patch
-          - major
       description:
         description: |
           Description of the release
